windows.old_description: Soy wax melting in a black pot on an induction hob.
windows.embed_text_v2: Laying out candle-making tools flat-lay on white marble: electric hot plate with skillet, stainless steel and clear pouring pitchers, blue silicone spatula, digital scale, glass thermometer
windows.summary_v2: A top-down flat-lay introducing candle-making tools one by one on a marble counter: a hot plate with pan, pouring pitchers, a silicone spatula, a digital scale and a thermometer.

tags_v2.action: laying out candle-making tools in a flat-lay

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down view of an empty white marble countertop before the candle-making tools are laid out.
An electric hot-plate burner holding a grey skillet appears at left, with a stainless steel pouring pitcher set above it.
Same flat-lay of the hot plate, pan and steel pouring pitcher arranged on the marble surface.
A clear plastic pouring pitcher with a spout is added at the bottom beside the hot plate and steel jug.
A blue silicone spatula stirring utensil joins the layout to the right of the pouring pitcher.
The flat-lay now shows hot plate, steel pitcher, plastic pitcher and blue spatula as the tool set builds.
Items hold steady on the marble: burner with pan, two pouring pitchers and the blue stirrer.
A silver digital kitchen scale appears at right, completing the right side of the tool layout.
A glass thermometer is added beside the scale, finishing the flat-lay of candle-making tools on marble.
